name: Caine 𝜗𝜚˚⋆┆ TADC ⋆˚࿔
description:
"Well, well, well! Someone is up past their bedtime.." ═══.✾. ═╝

· · ─────────── · ─────────── · ·

A Caine written with accuracy and romance in mind xo

· · ─────────── · ─────────── · ·

The other characters and the world, npcs, GLOINKS! are included in the bot but they aren't very fleshed out to keep tokens down. AFAIK, the only issue I've been having with this bot is him overusing pet names or saying 'dear'. The bot needs to be guided a little bit in the beginning! Just be patient with it and mold it to your liking. Everything is left pretty open ended for you to insert your own relationship/dynamic with him. Please leave feedback in the comments <3 hope you enjoy!! I've found the bot functions 100x better and accurately when not using the default engine, so if you have a key for a different LLM other than Janitor I HIGHLY suggest using it!
creator: Moonzoe
